tags.qa_notes: Coordinates corrected from 18.36/-78.36 (Negril) to ~18.491/-77.939 (Montego Bay Marine Park). PADI confirms coordinates 18.49133,-77.93907. Multiple sources confirm cave is in Montego Bay, not Negril.
Depth confirmed 40-70ft (12-21m). Orange elephant ear sponges confirmed. Negril location confirmed (Bloody Bay area). Dolphin sighting claim removed - not site-specific.
Marine park established 1991 confirmed. Multiple sites within park confirmed. Depth range 3-15m confirmed.
Wall dive confirmed for southwestern Negril reef tip. Deep wall to 90ft+ confirmed by multiple sources.
Within Montego Bay Marine Park confirmed. Shallow reef with small plane wreck at ~12m confirmed.

Depth corrected from 10m to ~17m (55ft per ScubaBoard; 60ft/18m per other sources). Difficulty upgraded from Beginner to Intermediate accordingly. Near The Arches confirmed. Aircraft is a Cessna. Coordinate kept near Arches/Bloody Bay area per ScubaBoard reference.
Swim-through arches at 40-60ft confirmed. Hedo Diving and multiple sources confirm location and type.

Only 2 independent sources found for site-specific details. Port Royal historical ruins access requires government permission (UNESCO site). This reef adjacent to Port Royal is distinct from the restricted ruins dive. Cannot achieve 3 independent site-specific sources - left unvalidated.

SS Kathryn history corrected: sunk 1991 (not 1950s) as artificial reef. Length sources conflict: 120ft (my-island-jamaica.com) vs 140ft (wannadive, zentacle, divebooker). Both claims documented. Reef sites confirmed: Great House Reef, Jewel Reef, wall sites per ScubaCaribe.

Wall confirmed, drops to 130ft+ per scuba-jamaica.com. Cayman Trench proximity to north coast confirmed (between Jamaica and Cayman Islands). Canyon, Groupers Drop, Pockets Reef, Reggae Queen confirmed as Runaway Bay sites.

Cannot find 3 independent sources for this as a distinct named dive site. The Cayman Trench is between Jamaica and the Cayman Islands (not immediately off Negril specifically). This appears to be a curated/descriptive entry rather than a documented named site. Left unvalidated.
Within Montego Bay Marine Park confirmed. Shallow coral garden character confirmed.

tags.name: Lady G'Diver
tags.qa_notes: FLAGGED: Lady G'Diver is a PADI 5-Star dive operator/facility near Port Antonio, NOT a dive site. OSM tagged sport=scuba_diving at operator premises. Should be removed or replaced with an actual named dive site (e.g., Paul Bogle Shipwreck at 60ft/18m operated by Lady G'Diver, or Alligator Head reef). NOT validated as a dive site.

tags.name: Chubb Reef (Dive Site)
tags.qa_notes: Montego Bay Marine Park reef confirmed. Shallow beginner character confirmed. Name refers to Bermuda chubs (schoolmaster fish) seen at site.

tags.name: Bowden Reef
tags.qa_notes: No site-specific sources found beyond OSM. Southeast Jamaica coast receives almost no documented recreational dive traffic. Cannot achieve 3 independent sources. Previous validation_source 'perplexity' is not an independent source. Left unvalidated.

tags.name: Dead Man's Bones
tags.qa_notes: No site-specific dive sources found. OSM entry exists. Southeast Jamaica coast is rarely dived commercially. Cannot achieve 3 independent sources. Previous 'perplexity' source not valid. Left unvalidated.

tags.name: Bush Cay
tags.qa_notes: No site-specific dive sources found beyond OSM. North coast cay between Montego Bay and Falmouth. Previous 'perplexity' validation insufficient. Left unvalidated.

tags.name: Fish Pond (Dive Site)
tags.qa_notes: Montego Bay Marine Park site with caverns/overhangs confirmed. Eagle ray sightings confirmed. Depth 51-60ft (15-18m) confirmed.

tags.name: Fish Pond Edge (Dive Site)
tags.qa_notes: Adjacent to Fish Pond in Montego Bay Marine Park. Only 2 distinct sources found specifically for this as a separate site from Fish Pond. Left unvalidated separately.

tags.name: Stingray City (Dive Site)
tags.qa_notes: Sandy bottom at ~30ft/9m confirmed. Southern stingrays confirmed. Montego Bay Marine Park location confirmed. Multiple operator sources confirm site.

tags.name: Pelican Reef (Dive Site)
tags.qa_notes: Montego Bay Marine Park reef confirmed. Beginner shallow reef character confirmed.

tags.name: Gun Cay
tags.qa_notes: ScubaBoard confirms 'the reefs around the other cays (Maiden and drunkenmans) are diveable' for this area. Only 1 source found. Cannot achieve 3 independent sources for this specific cay. Left unvalidated.
